# Manual concierge first

## When to use

Use when automation is not proven yet.

## Why it works

Gets learning and customer proof quickly.

## Mechanism

Manual delivery validates demand before code.

## Required inputs

Offer audit/setup done manually.

## When not to use

If delivery cannot scale at all.

## Campaign artifact checklist

```text
Buyer state:
Audience:
Pain phrase:
Offer:
Proof asset:
Landing page:
Ad variants:
Measurement event:
Kill rule:
Next test if failed:
```

## Metrics

Calls, paid pilots, repeat problems.

## Agent instruction

Generate at least five ad variants, one landing-page proof path, one measurement plan, and one learning memo template for this tactic.
